view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking process.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking process.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step to validate the requirement of a 'Simple online booking page' is supported by multiple pieces of evidence. The successful booking by a customer (evidence from 'customer-book-primary' step) confirms that clients can visit the booking page, select available slots, and complete the booking process, which aligns with the requirement. Additionally, the linked use case explicitly states the need for a simple online booking page, further reinforcing that this requirement is met.
